channel.title: MS Graph Registry Updates
channel.description: Real-time notifications for new Microsoft Graph Permissions

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForChat
item.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the chat, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.FeatureRollout
item.description: Allows the app to read and write feature rollout policies without a signed-in user. Includes abilities to assign and remove users and groups to rollout of a specific feature.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWriteForChat.All
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall all tabs for any chat, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForTeam
item.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the team, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityRiskyAgent.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read risky agents information in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxConfigItem.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete user's UserConfiguration objects, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-InboundFlow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write inbound data flows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Setting.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read Tenant Governance settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ContentActivity.Read
item.description: Read contents activity audit log from the audit store.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Group.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read group properties and memberships, and read conversations for all groups, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.Read.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to read time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamTemplates.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all available Teams Templates, without a signed-user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamMember.ReadWriteNonOwnerRole.All
item.description: Add and remove non-owner members from all teams, without a signed-in user. Does not allow changing a member's role to or from owner.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PeopleSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write tenant-wide people settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthenticationMethod.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. Authentication methods include things like a user's phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-SourceSystem.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write source system definitions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update user profiles and read basic company properties without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Device.CreateFromOwnedTemplate
item.description: Allows the app to create a device from a device template owned by the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ManagedTenants.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all managed tenant information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-SoftwareOATH.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read SoftwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security available user actions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Domain.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all domain properties without a signed in user. Also allows the app to add, verify and remove domains.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Files.ReadWrite.AppFolder
item.description: (Preview) Allows the app to read, create, update and delete files in the application's folder.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyUser.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky user information for your organization without a signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky users.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxFolder.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the user's mailbox folders, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ManageIdentities.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account, without a signed in user. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Calendars.ReadWrite.Shared
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete events in all calendars in the organization user has permissions to access. This includes delegate and shared calendars.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.Selected
item.description: Allow the application to access a subset of site collections on behalf of the signed-in user. The specific site collections and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForChat.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.EnableDisableAccount.All
item.description: Allows the app to enable and disable users' accounts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SignInIdentifier.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's sign-in identifiers, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.Create
item.description: Allows the app to create chats without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's QR authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read assignments information on behalf of the user without reading any feedback or outcomes.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SensitivityLabel.Read
item.description: Allows the app to get sensitivity labels.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ServiceMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service announcement messages, without a signed-in user. Messages may include information about new or changed features.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.Read.ConditionalAccess
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's conditional access policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app the read and write all device authentication certificate configurations without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.Export.All
item.description: Allows the app to export data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with any user in your company, when the app is used by a privileged user (e.g. a Company Administrator).

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BitlockerKey.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows an app to read basic BitLocker key properties for all devices, without a signed-in user. Does not allow read of the recovery key.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Device.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-Run.Start
item.description: Allows the app to view and start IndustryData runs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalItem.Read.All
item.description: Allow the app to read external datasets and content, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForUser.All
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself to any user, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.AuthenticationFlows
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the authentication flow policies, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentCardManifest.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write to all agent card manifests in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Group.Create
item.description: Allows the app to create groups without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementScripts.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Intune device compliance scripts, device management scripts, device shell scripts, device custom attribute shell scripts and device health scripts on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelSettings.Read.All
item.description: Read all channel names, channel descriptions, and channel settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomAuthenticationExtension.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's custom authentication extnesions, on behalf of the signed-in user.
